CRITICAL BUGS (3)

BUG-001 Critical DevRev PLuG SDK Fails on Every Page Load
Pages AffectedAll pages
Steps to Reproduce
  1. Open any page on acme.qa.egalvanic.ai
  2. Open browser DevTools > Console
ExpectedDevRev support widget loads successfully
Actualplug-platform.devrev.ai/static/plug.js fails with net::ERR_FAILED. Console shows [DevRev] Failed to load SDK and [PLuG] SDK not loaded yet on every single page load.
ImpactCustomer support/feedback widget is completely broken for ALL users across ALL pages.
Console Evidence
ERROR Failed to load resource: net::ERR_FAILED https://plug-platform.devrev.ai/static/plug.js ERROR [DevRev] Failed to load SDK: Error: [DevRev] Failed to load PLuG SDK from https://plug-platform.devrev.ai/static/plug.js WARN [PLuG] SDK not loaded yet

Dashboard showing console errors (DevRev SDK failures appear on every page)

BUG-002 Critical N+1 API Query Pattern — 96 Individual Requests Per Page Load
Pages AffectedDashboard, Tasks, Connections, Assets, Locations — any page loading SLD data
Steps to Reproduce
  1. Navigate to /dashboard
  2. Open DevTools > Network tab
  3. Count requests to node-subtypes and shortcut/by-node-class
ExpectedA single batch API call to fetch all node subtypes and shortcuts
ActualThe app fires individual GET /api/lookup/node-subtypes/{id} AND GET /api/shortcut/by-node-class/{id} for every node class. On the Dashboard alone, 96 individual API calls are made.
96
Total API Calls
37+37
N+1 Calls (subtypes + shortcuts)
8.1s
Slowest Single Call
408s
Total API Duration (cumulative)
855 KB
Total API Transfer
4.25s
Average Call Duration
Network Evidence (Top 5 Slowest Calls)
GET /api/shortcut/by-node-class/453df10a-... 8,097ms GET /api/lookup/node-subtypes/f31862a3-... 8,081ms GET /api/lookup/node-subtypes/e885de93-... 8,070ms GET /api/lookup/node-subtypes/f0b3be94-... 8,043ms GET /api/lookup/node-subtypes/496927b5-... 8,028ms DUPLICATE CALLS DETECTED: /api/users/{id}/roles called 3x (should be 1x) /api/users/{id}/slds called 2x (should be 1x) /api/node_classes/user/{id} called 2x (should be 1x) /api/lookup/nodes/{sldId} called 2x (should be 1x)
ImpactMassive performance degradation. Pages take 5+ seconds to fully load. Gets exponentially worse as data grows. Puts unnecessary load on the backend. Fix: batch these into 2 API calls total.
BUG-003 Critical Sentry DSN and Project Credentials Exposed in Client JS Bundle
Pages AffectedAll pages
Steps to Reproduce
  1. Open DevTools > Network tab
  2. Filter by "sentry"
  3. Observe the Sentry envelope POST requests
ExpectedSentry credentials should not be easily extractable
ActualCredentials visible in plaintext in network requests:
POST https://o4509671240105984.ingest.us.sentry.io/api/4510464365101056/envelope/ ?sentry_version=7 &sentry_key=b6be32259a437065e80bc19260796221 &sentry_client=sentry.javascript.react/10.27.0 Exposed values: sentry_key: b6be32259a437065e80bc19260796221 project_id: 4510464365101056 org_id: o4509671240105984
ImpactAttackers could flood Sentry with fake error reports, exhaust event quota, or mask real production errors.

HIGH SEVERITY BUGS (7)

BUG-004 High "App Update Available" Banner Persists Across All Pages
Pages AffectedAll pages after login
Steps to Reproduce
  1. Log in to the application
  2. Navigate to any page — banner appears
  3. Click DISMISS
  4. Navigate to another page — banner reappears
ExpectedBanner should not reappear after dismissal, or app should auto-update
ActualAlert banner saying "A new app update is available. Please save your current work before clicking Update to refresh the app." appears on every page and reappears after navigation. Dismissal state is not persisted (not stored in localStorage/sessionStorage).
ImpactPersistent annoyance for all users. Banner overlaps dashboard stat cards and obscures content. On some pages (Condition Assessment), content renders blank behind the banner.
BUG-005 High SPA State Not Persisted in URL — Site/SLD Context Lost on Reload
Pages AffectedAssets, Tasks, Connections, Locations, and any page requiring site context
Steps to Reproduce
  1. Navigate to /tasks directly (paste URL in browser)
  2. Observe console logs
ExpectedThe page should load with previously selected site context, or URL should include the site/SLD ID
ActualConsole logs: [Tasks] No sldId provided, showing error message and [SLD] No sldId provided; skipping fetch. Site selector briefly shows "No sites available" before eventually loading. Full page reload loses selected site/SLD.
Console Evidence
WARN [SLD] No sldId provided; skipping fetch LOG [Tasks] fetchTasks called with sldId: null LOG [Tasks] No sldId provided, showing error message LOG [Layout] Sites state updated {count: 0, sites: []} ← Shows 0 before populating LOG [Layout] Sites state updated {count: 33, sites: [...]} ← Then loads 33
ImpactUsers cannot bookmark or share deep links. Refreshing the page forces re-selection of site context. Race condition causes flicker.
BUG-006 High Connections Grid Shows All Identical Rows
Pages Affected/connections
Steps to Reproduce
  1. Navigate to Connections page
  2. Observe the grid rows
ExpectedEach row should display unique connection data
ActualAll visible rows show identical data: Source Node = "Busway 2", Target Node = "Busway 2", Connection Type = "Cable". All 6+ visible rows are duplicates.
ImpactEither a data bug (self-referencing connections) or a rendering bug where the same data is repeated. Arc Flash Readiness at 2% (5 of 308 required fields completed).
BUG-007 High Duplicate API Calls on Every Page Load (React Re-render Issue)
Pages AffectedAll pages
Steps to Reproduce
  1. Open DevTools > Network tab
  2. Navigate to any page
  3. Filter by /api/users or /api/slds
ExpectedEach API endpoint called once per page load
ActualMultiple APIs are called twice or more:
API Call Count Expected ───────────────────────────────────────────────────── /api/users/{id}/roles 3x 1x /api/users/{id}/slds 2x 1x /api/lookup/nodes/{sldId} 2x 1x /api/node_classes/user/{id} 2x 1x /api/users/{id}/slds (SLDs fetch) 2x 1x
ImpactDoubles the API load on every navigation, wasting bandwidth and server resources. Likely caused by React re-render or missing useEffect dependencies.
BUG-008 High All 53 Pending Tasks Are Overdue — Zero Due Soon
Pages Affected/tasks
Steps to Reproduce
  1. Navigate to Tasks page
  2. Observe the summary stats at the top
ExpectedA reasonable distribution of pending, overdue, and due-soon tasks
ActualPending = 53, Overdue = 53, Due Soon (Next 30 Days) = 0, Completed = 3. Every single pending task is overdue with zero due soon.
ImpactEither a systemic workflow failure or incorrect due date logic. Overdue count matching pending count exactly suggests a data or logic issue.
BUG-009 High Date Format Inconsistency Across Pages
Pages AffectedTasks page vs. Work Orders page
Steps to Reproduce
  1. Navigate to /tasks — observe date format: 14/11/2025 (DD/MM/YYYY)
  2. Navigate to /sessions — observe date format: Mar 20, 2026 (MMM DD, YYYY)
ExpectedConsistent date format across the entire application
ActualTasks uses DD/MM/YYYY while Work Orders uses MMM DD, YYYY. No date format standardization.
ImpactConfusing for users. In international contexts, 14/11/2025 vs 11/14/2025 can cause date misinterpretation.
BUG-010 High Building Name Concatenation Bug on Locations Page
Pages Affected/locations
Steps to Reproduce
  1. Navigate to Locations page
  2. Scroll through building cards
  3. Find the building with a garbled name
ExpectedBuilding name shows the updated name only
ActualOne building card displays: SmokeTest_Building_177312475862SmokeTest_Building_1773124758627_Updated7 — the original name and the updated name are concatenated together instead of the update replacing the original.
ImpactData corruption or rendering bug. Building names are garbled and unreadable.

MEDIUM SEVERITY BUGS (8)

BUG-011 Medium Test Data Pollution Across All Data Pages
Pages AffectedWork Orders, Issues, Locations, Tasks, Scheduling
Actual
  • Work Orders: 31 entries, most named SmokeTest_WO_* or AutoTest_WO_*
  • Issues: 50+ entries named Smoke Test Issue
  • Locations: 40+ entries named SmokeTest_Building_*
  • Tasks: entries named T1, tesyv, 20, offline task
  • Scheduling: All work orders are SmokeTest entries with overdue status
ImpactQA environment is heavily polluted. Test cleanup is not working.

Issues page: 50+ "Smoke Test Issue" entries

Work Orders: SmokeTest entries + missing Status column

BUG-012 Medium Dashboard Shows "Company information not available" Alert
Pages Affected/dashboard
ImpactUsers see an error on their first screen after login. Poor first impression.
BUG-013 Medium Site Selector Shows "No sites available" Flicker on Load
Pages AffectedAll pages with site selector
ActualDropdown briefly shows "No sites available" before populating (33 sites exist). Console confirms: [Layout] Sites state updated {count: 0} fires before the SLD API responds.
ImpactJarring flash of error state on every navigation.
BUG-014 Medium Sentry Error Reporting Partially Failing
Pages AffectedAll pages
Actual2 out of 3 Sentry envelope POST requests fail with net::ERR_ABORTED.
ImpactError telemetry is unreliable. Monitoring blind spots in production.
BUG-015 Medium Work Orders Grid Missing Status Column
Pages Affected/sessions (Work Orders)
ActualGrid only shows 4 columns: Created, Priority, Work Order, SA / Plan. No Status column visible.
ImpactUsers must click into each work order to see its status. No way to filter or sort by status from the list view.
BUG-016 Medium Arc Flash Readiness at 7% — Critical Fields Incomplete
Pages Affected/arc-flash, /connections
ActualArc Flash dashboard shows 7% overall readiness. Connections page shows 2% — only 5 of 308 required fields completed across 44 connections.
ImpactFeature adoption is near-zero. Either the required fields are too burdensome or the workflow is broken.
BUG-017 Medium Most Tasks Missing Type Classification
Pages Affected/tasks
ActualMost task rows show "—" in the Type column. Only 1 out of 7 visible tasks has a type (PM). Task categorization and filtering is ineffective.
BUG-018 Medium Beamer Analytics Leaks User Role and Company in URL
Pages AffectedAll pages (Beamer loads on every page)
ActualBeamer request URL contains user metadata in plaintext query string:
GET https://backend.getbeamer.com/numberFeatures ?product=yexgrqxp65097 &c_user_role=Admin &c_user_company=EG-ACME &firstname=abhiyant &lastname=admin &c_user_hash=a17d7a11c55350fbe09cd53621f0a0f2...
ImpactUser roles, company identifiers, and names in URLs can be cached by proxies, CDNs, and appear in server logs.

NEW BUGS FOUND IN THIS SESSION (7)

BUG-019 New — High Dashboard Stat Cards Overlap — Numbers and Labels Collide
Pages Affected/dashboard
Steps to Reproduce
  1. Navigate to Dashboard
  2. Observe the stat cards row at the top
ExpectedEach stat card should display its value clearly without overlapping adjacent cards
ActualThe stat values overlap each other. "ACTIVE WORK ORDERS" value (31) collides with "OPPORTUNITIES VALUE" ($0). The text "OPPORTUNITIES VALUE" wraps poorly. "EQUIPMENT AT RISK" value "$2750.4k" is partially cut off. The numbers 1,864, 6, 53, 31, $0, $2750 all run together creating an unreadable mess.
ImpactDashboard is the primary landing page — key business metrics are unreadable. Responsive layout is broken.
BUG-020 New — High Admin Settings Shows 0 Sites — Data Inconsistency with App
Pages Affected/admin (Settings > Sites tab)
Steps to Reproduce
  1. Navigate to Settings page
  2. Observe the Sites tab (default view)
ExpectedShould list the 33 active sites that appear in the site selector dropdown throughout the app
ActualShows "No rows" and "0–0 of 0" in the pagination. Meanwhile, the site selector dropdown in the header shows 33 sites. The SLD API confirms 33 active sites exist.
ImpactAdmin cannot manage sites through the Settings page. Critical admin functionality is broken.
BUG-021 New — High Opportunities Pipeline Labels Truncated — Unreadable Status Cards
Pages Affected/opportunities
Steps to Reproduce
  1. Navigate to Opportunities page
  2. Observe the pipeline status cards at the top
ExpectedFull pipeline stage names visible: "Qualified", "Pending Response", "Closed Won", "Closed Lost"
ActualLabels are truncated: "QUALI...", "PENDI... RESPO...", "CLOSI... WON", "CLOSI... LOST". Cards are too narrow for the text. Additionally, all pipeline values show $0 with "0 opportuni..." (also truncated), but the API returns 11 opportunities — only 1 appears in the grid filtered to current site.
ImpactSales pipeline overview is unreadable. Users cannot quickly assess opportunity distribution.
BUG-022 New — Medium Scheduling Page Shows Only Test Work Orders — All Overdue
Pages Affected/scheduling
Steps to Reproduce
  1. Navigate to Scheduling page
  2. Observe the work order list
ExpectedReal work orders with proper scheduling data
ActualAll visible entries are SmokeTest_WO_* test data. Every entry shows a red clock icon (overdue) and "After 3/17/26" date. No real scheduling data visible.
ImpactScheduling feature is unusable with only test data. All entries are overdue.
BUG-023 New — Medium Condition Assessment Renders Blank Behind Update Banner
Pages Affected/pm-readiness (Condition Assessment)
Steps to Reproduce
  1. Navigate directly to /pm-readiness
  2. Observe the content area while the update banner is showing
ExpectedPage content should load regardless of banner state
ActualThe entire content area shows only a loading spinner behind the update banner. Content only appears after the banner is dismissed. Other pages (Dashboard, Tasks) render content behind the banner; this page does not.
ImpactUsers may think the page is broken if they don't dismiss the banner first. Condition Assessment shows 0% PM-Ready (only 1 of 1,860 assets).

Page renders blank behind the update banner

After dismissing banner: 28% completion, 0% PM-Ready Assets (1 of 1,860)

BUG-024 New — Medium Equipment Insights — Type Column Truncated, All "Circuit Breaker"
Pages Affected/equipment-insights
Steps to Reproduce
  1. Navigate to Equipment Insights page
  2. Observe the data grid
ExpectedFull equipment type visible, variety of equipment types in the grid
ActualThe Type column shows "Low Vo..." (truncated "Low Voltage") for all rows. All 5 visible rows show "Circuit Breaker" designation with only Square D and Siemens as manufacturers. The grid shows 46 entries total but lacks column diversity — no visible model numbers, ratings, or distinguishing data.
ImpactEquipment Insights grid doesn't provide enough data differentiation to be useful for NETA testing analysis.
BUG-025 New — Low Different JS Bundle Hashes Served Across Pages — Cache Invalidation Issue
Pages AffectedAll pages
Steps to Reproduce
  1. Navigate to /tasks — observe bundle: index-CnGxCKdJ.js
  2. Navigate to /scheduling — observe bundle: index-Pto_Hh1I.js
ExpectedSame bundle hash served consistently across the application
ActualTwo different JS bundle hashes are served depending on the page:
  • Dashboard, Tasks, Connections, Issues, Arc Flash: index-CnGxCKdJ.js
  • Scheduling, Opportunities, Accounts, Settings: index-Pto_Hh1I.js
This suggests a deployment inconsistency or CDN cache fragmentation. It may be the root cause of the persistent "App Update Available" banner.
ImpactUsers may get different app versions on different pages. Could cause subtle state management bugs and the persistent update banner.
BUG-026 NEW-MEDIUM SLDs Page — Duplicate "Select View" Dropdown
Pages Affected/slds
Steps to Reproduce
  1. Navigate to /slds
  2. Observe the controls above the SLD diagram area
ExpectedA single "Select View" dropdown for choosing the SLD view
ActualTwo identical "Select View" dropdown controls are rendered side by side. Both appear functional. This is a duplicate render bug — likely a React component rendered twice.
ImpactConfusing UI. Users don't know which dropdown to use. Indicates a component lifecycle / mounting bug.

SLDs page showing duplicate "Select View" dropdowns:

BUG-027 NEW-MEDIUM Attachments Page — Duplicate fetchAttachments API Call
Pages Affected/attachments
Steps to Reproduce
  1. Navigate to /attachments
  2. Open DevTools > Console
  3. Observe: [Attachments] No sldId provided, showing error message fires TWICE before data loads
ExpectedAttachments fetched once after SLD context is resolved
ActualfetchAttachments is called twice — once before sldId is available (fails), then again after. Same duplicate-call pattern as BUG-007. Console confirms the "No sldId" error fires twice.
Network Evidence
[Attachments] No sldId provided, showing error message (x2) [SLD] No sldId provided; skipping fetch Fetching user roles {userId: "77e99d86-..."} (x2) Fetching SLDs {endpoint: /users/.../slds} (x2)
ImpactWasted API calls. Brief error state flashes before data loads. Part of the systemic duplicate-call pattern (BUG-007).

Attachments page with update banner and 11 entries:

BUG-028 NEW-MEDIUM Audit Log — Duplicate Mutations API Call + Unnecessary SLD Fetches
Pages Affected/admin/audit-log
Steps to Reproduce
  1. Navigate to /admin/audit-log
  2. Open DevTools > Network tab
  3. Observe GET /api/mutations called twice with slightly different timestamps
  4. Observe SLD-related API calls (nodes, edges, views) firing — despite the Audit Log not needing SLD data
ExpectedMutations API called once. No SLD-related calls on admin pages.
Actual
GET /api/mutations?limit=25&offset=0&since=2026-03-21T06:01:40.954Z → 200 GET /api/mutations?limit=25&offset=0&since=2026-03-21T06:01:41.236Z → 200 (DUPLICATE - 282ms apart) GET /api/users/.../roles → 200 (x2) GET /api/users/.../slds → 200 (x2) GET /api/lookup/nodes/21bd10d4-... → 200 (unnecessary) GET /api/sld/21bd10d4-.../views → 200 (unnecessary) GET /api/node_classes/user/77e99d86-... → 200 (x2) GET /api/edge_classes/user/77e99d86-... → pending
ImpactDoubles mutation query load. Fetches SLD data (nodes, edges, views, node classes) unnecessarily on an admin page that doesn't display SLD content — wasting ~10 extra API calls per page load.

Audit Log page showing dual search bars and "0 mutations":

BUG-029 NEW-LOW Audit Log — Dual Redundant Search Fields
Pages Affected/admin/audit-log
Steps to Reproduce
  1. Navigate to /admin/audit-log
  2. Observe two separate search inputs: "Search..." at the top AND "Search items..." below the filters
ExpectedA single search field for filtering audit log entries
ActualTwo search fields visible: one labeled "Search..." above the filter dropdowns (Status, Entity Type, Time Range), and a second "Search items..." below the filters in the MUI DataGrid toolbar. Users don't know which one to use.
ImpactConfusing UX. One search may filter client-side while the other queries the API — inconsistent behavior.
BUG-030 NEW-LOW Z University — Developer Loading Text "Channeling my inner Mukul..."
Pages Affected/z-university
Steps to Reproduce
  1. Navigate to /z-university
  2. Watch the loading spinner text before content loads
ExpectedProfessional loading text like "Loading..." or "Loading articles..."
ActualLoading spinner displays "Channeling my inner Mukul..." — an internal developer joke/reference visible to all users. Additionally, console shows [ZUniversity] urlMap keys: [] meaning S3 video URL mapping is empty (videos may not load).
ImpactUnprofessional loading text visible to customers. Video content may be broken (empty urlMap).

Z University page content (loaded after the joke loading text):

Recommended Fix Priority

  1. BUG-025 → BUG-004 — Fix deployment/CDN inconsistency (different bundle hashes), which likely causes the persistent update banner
  2. BUG-002 — N+1 API pattern (biggest perf win: batch node-subtypes & shortcuts into 2 calls instead of 74)
  3. BUG-007 — Duplicate API calls (React re-render / missing useEffect deps)
  4. BUG-001 — DevRev SDK failure (fix or remove the broken integration)
  5. BUG-005 — URL state persistence (fundamental SPA usability — store sldId in URL)
  6. BUG-019 — Dashboard stat card layout (CSS grid/flex fix for responsive layout)
  7. BUG-020 — Admin Settings sites list (API endpoint or permission issue)
  8. BUG-021 — Opportunities pipeline card layout (width/truncation CSS fix)
  9. BUG-006 — Connections grid identical rows (data or rendering issue)
  10. BUG-010 — Building name concatenation (data corruption on update)
  11. BUG-011 — Test data cleanup (implement proper test teardown in automation)
  12. BUG-026 — SLDs duplicate dropdown (React double-mount / StrictMode issue)
  13. BUG-028 — Audit Log unnecessary SLD fetches (admin pages should skip SLD loading)
  14. BUG-030 — Z University developer joke in loading text (quick string fix)
